scheme_details.nodal_agency: Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI) & National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD)
scheme_details.ministry: Ministry of Finance, Government of India
scheme_details.objective: To promote entrepreneurship among women and Scheduled Caste (SC) / Scheduled Tribe (ST) communities by facilitating bank loans for setting up greenfield enterprises.

key_features.target_beneficiaries: At least one SC or ST borrower and at least one woman borrower per bank branch.
key_features.loan_amount: From Rs. 10 Lakh up to Rs. 1 Crore.
key_features.loan_type: Composite Loan (inclusive of Term Loan and Working Capital).
key_features.project_type: Greenfield Projects only (first-time venture in manufacturing, services, trading, or activities allied to agriculture).

eligibility_criteria.non_individual_entities: At least 51% of shareholding and controlling stake must be held by an SC/ST and/or Woman Entrepreneur.
eligibility_criteria.credit_history: The borrower should not be in default to any bank or financial institution.

financial_terms_and_benefits.interest_rate: Lowest applicable rate of the bank for that category, not to exceed (MCLR + 3% + Tenor Premium).
financial_terms_and_benefits.security: Besides primary security, the loan can be secured by collateral security or guarantee under the Credit Guarantee Fund Scheme for Stand-Up India Loans (CGFSIL).
financial_terms_and_benefits.repayment_period: Repayable in 7 years with a maximum moratorium period of 18 months.

working_capital_support.up_to_10_lakh: Sanctioned by way of Overdraft (OD) with a RuPay debit card.
working_capital_support.above_10_lakh: Sanctioned by way of Cash Credit (CC) limit.

financial_terms_and_benefits.margin_money: The margin requirement can be up to 15% of the project cost (can be converged with state/other schemes).

required_documents: Proof of Identity (Voter ID, Passport, Driving License, PAN Card)
Proof of Residence (Electricity Bill, Telephone Bill, Property Tax Receipt)
Project Report / Business Plan describing viability
Asset & Liability Statement of promoters and guarantors
